radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Engine 1 here, command. Report current fire conditions near the structure. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Command here, engine 1. Two vehicles fully involved near the sidewalk with heavy smoke moving toward the multi-story building. Finished.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_02
radio_messages.message: Command here, rescue 2. Two civilians located near the sidewalk at safe distance from the burning vehicles. No confirmed injuries observed. Finished.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Engine 1 here, command. Prioritize suppression on the burning vehicles and protect the adjacent parked vehicles. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Command here, engine 1. Affirmative. Suppression line operating on the vehicle fire. Three parked vehicles remain exposed. Finished.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Rescue two here. Engine one. Confirm civilians remain clear of the smoke and vehicle hazard area. Listening.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_02
radio_messages.message: Engine one here, rescue two. Confirmed. Civilians remain near the sidewalk at safe distance from the burning vehicles. Finished.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_01
radio_messages.message: Command here. Engine one. Fire intensity reduced on one vehicle. Second vehicle still actively burning. Finished.

radio_messages.speaker: SPEAKER_00
radio_messages.message: Engine one here, command. Continue suppression on the second vehicle and maintain exposure protection. Finished.
